extra.reason: Superseded by data-vb-event analytics attribute system. The 'data-track' proposal was reframed to 'data-vb-event' to match the canonical vb:* namespace (see <meta name="vb:*"> taxonomy). Implementation: src/lib/analytics.js handleDocumentClick + extractDeclarativeProps. Docs: site/src/pages/docs/attributes/data-vb-event.html. Properties via data-vb-event-* dataset → camelCase props. Auto-wired by the analytics runtime on boot.
